headline: Stop Sunday snacking: today starts your 0.74 kg/week turnaround
summary: You're gaining when you should be losing; today's vegan Huel-focused eating plus 45 minutes rowing breaks the pattern.
details: Eat three Huel meals today—no emotional snacking, no portions beyond measure. Spend 45 minutes on the rowing machine this morning before your work sedentary block begins. Today matters because one Sunday of discipline prevents the +0.05 kg/week death spiral and moves you 0.69 kg closer to 88 kg by next June.
